div.div: Automatically moves the stage from Quotation to Quotation Sent.

Send SMS
Send texts to your contacts

div.title: When populating your address book, ERP provides a list of matching companies. When selecting one item, the company data and logo are auto-filled.

div.div: Automatically enrich your contact base with company data

div.title: By default, new users get highest access rights for all installed apps.

div.div: Set custom access rights for new users
Allow users to import data from CSV/XLS/XLSX/ODS files
Add fun feedback and motivate your employees

div.title: Configure company rules to automatically create SO/PO when one of your company sells/buys to another of your company.

div.div: Automatically generate counterpart documents for orders/invoices between companies

div.title: Using your own email server is required to send/receive emails in Community and Enterprise versions. Online users already benefit from a ready-to-use email server (@mycompany.erp.com).

div.div: Configure your own email servers
New favicon image.
New title brand
New Text Replacement
Show standard terms & conditions on Orders
Allows you to configure order date same as quotation date.
Show standard terms & conditions on Invoices
Show standard terms & conditions on Delivery Orders
Show standard terms & conditions on Orders
Allows you to configure Confirmation date same as Order Deadline.
Show standard terms & conditions on Invoices

div.title: Allow you to enable the Currency symbol in the Excel Reports
Allow you to enable the Customer/Vendor name in the Tax Report
Allow you to merge the Bank Accounts in BS Reports

div.div: Main currency of your company
Record transactions in foreign currencies
Update exchange rates automatically
Update exchange rates automatically based on the selected service.
Rates are fetched from MAS (SGD-based) and converted automatically according to the company base currency.
Set the product description on the delivery order to be the same as the product description set in the sale order line.

xpath.div: Allow customer signature on delivery orders.
